product_name: Goebel Hummel Figural Wine Goblet Set (9pc)
attributes: 1960s-70s • West Germany • Goebel figural stems / Bockling bowls • 14K Gold Trim
condition_notes: Set of nine Goebel figural wine goblets, West Germany c.1960s-70s: hand-painted porcelain figurine stems (Bavarian/seasonal characters) in gold-rimmed amber bowls (Bockling) with 14K-gold grape-vine etching. Re-confirmed complete and excellent from new 2026-06-20 photos — gold bright, figurines crisp, no chips/cracks/gold wear.
